prose:
Aniline frontier orbitals calculated using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**) level of theory, with density fitting, in PySCF. The calculation was performed in the **gas phase** with a charge of 0 and multiplicity of 1. The geometry was taken from the user-supplied XYZ file (`/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz`), and this was a single point calculation on that fixed geometry. The SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings were reported.

The HOMO energy is -5.553772 eV.
The LUMO energy is -0.2489544 eV.
The HOMO-LUMO gap is 5.3048177 eV.
